articles.title_en: The A7 international settlement system issued bills worth 6.1 trillion rubles
articles.lead_en: The Western control system, rising costs for verifying each transaction and the actual refusal of banks from unfriendly states to work with Russian business broke the old payment model and led to the search for alternative payment instruments, noted the Deputy General Director
